# 利用GitHub搭建个人博客
> 参照[柏莹的教程](https://github.com/qiubaiying/qiubaiying.github.io/wiki/%E5%8D%9A%E5%AE%A2%E6%90%AD%E5%BB%BA%E8%AF%A6%E7%BB%86%E6%95%99%E7%A8%8B)利用github 搭建自己的个人博客，来存放自己的一些学习笔记

## fork repository from qiubaiying
- 登录自己的github账号，fork [qiubaiying.github.io](qiubaiying/giubaiying.github.io) 仓库
![fork qiubaiying.github.io](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/7be064b14bc82f2d9126c6fc37f2ab0d5ec543ee/687474703a2f2f75706c6f61642d696d616765732e6a69616e7368752e696f2f75706c6f61645f696d616765732f323137383637322d316232333466623835343965353861612e6a70673f696d6167654d6f6772322f6175746f2d6f7269656e742f7374726970253743696d61676556696577322f322f772f31323430)

- 修改仓库名
    - 点击settings进入设置
    ![fork setting](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/3f368f6c392e317467135f41e1c828e9ffeb7b31/687474703a2f2f75706c6f61642d696d616765732e6a69616e7368752e696f2f75706c6f61645f696d616765732f323137383637322d663437623765343830326465366133342e6a70673f696d6167654d6f6772322f6175746f2d6f7269656e742f7374726970253743696d61676556696577322f322f772f31323430)
    - 修改仓库名为 `github账号.github.io`, Rename
    ![fork rename](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/45e1c7f1020aaf6efeb320baa3d8141dd7216346/687474703a2f2f75706c6f61642d696d616765732e6a69616e7368752e696f2f75706c6f61645f696d616765732f323137383637322d636133643834336535323663646435622e6a70673f696d6167654d6f6772322f6175746f2d6f7269656e742f7374726970253743696d61676556696577322f322f772f31323430)
